text:
Once upon a time, there was a young girl named Penelope who lived in a quaint little village beside a sparkling river. Every dawn, she would race along the riverbank, her feet slicing through the fresh water, dreaming of adventures. Her favorite thing to dream about was discovering a hidden world beneath the trees by the river.

One day, inspired by her dreams, Penelope decided to take on the task herself. With a small sack crafted from leaves swung around her neck, she ventured deeper into the forest than ever before. She could hear songs coming from somewhere deep within. Creeping through the woods, she finally reached a clearing where a clearing sunlit the leaves. There, in a ringed clearing, was an old oak tree with boughs filled with singing birds.

Penelope listened. It wasn't just them—they were a choir! Birds of all kinds, warbling with delightful melodies. Intrigued, she approached. She joined their song, her voice mingling with theirs
